word: G461 - ἀνορθόω - anorthóō - an-orth-o'-o - Lift up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνορθόω

- Transliteration: Anorthoo

- Phonetic: an-orth-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to set up, make erect

a. of a deformed person

2. to rear again, build anew

- Origin: from G303 and a derivative of the base of G3717

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and a derivative of the base of G3717; to straighten up: - lift (set) up make straight.
